name: Rice Crispies Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar, corn syrup, and peanut butter in a bowl. Stir until the sugar has melted and the peanut butter is fully dissolved into the mixture.
2. Pour the mixture over the rice crispy treats on wax paper.
3. Place the coated Rice Crispies cookies in the refrigerator until they are set.
